headline: Prudential Financial: Recent Pullback Provides A Buying Opportunity In Subordinated Notes
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc.'s 4.125% junior subordinated notes slipped early in 2026, impacted by broad-based weakness in FII. Read more on PFH stock here.

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.
